title: HUQAN V4 Action Verdict
description: Canonical, reconciled verdict projection produced by lib/verdict/action-verdict.js from either the admission gate (lib/memory-admission-gate.js) or the MCP gate (lib/mcp-gate-adapter.js). This schema does not define a new runtime decision vocabulary; it documents the single canonical projection both existing vocabularies map onto. See docs/v4/verdict-reconciliation.md.

verdict.description: The single canonical product verdict. `require_approval` is intentionally absent -- it is a UI-facing classification of `review`, not a runtime verdict value.

sourceLayer.description: Which existing gate produced the original decision.

sourceDecision.description: The original, un-reconciled decision string from the source layer (e.g. 'reject' from the admission gate, projected here as 'block').

reason.description: Human/audit-readable reason carried over from the source decision, unmodified.

actor.description: Actor identity as supplied to the source gate, carried through unmodified (verdict input, not a HUQAN-issued identity).

receiptId.description: Receipt identifier from the source decision, if any. Presence here does not imply tamper-evidence or export capability -- see docs/v4/no-mock-contract-and-claim-boundaries.md and V4-PR2.5.

metadata.description: Opaque metadata carried over from the source decision, unmodified.
